sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52586" key="ka/lika" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάλικα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, only in gen. pl. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καλικῶν</foreign>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n52586.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">caliga, boot, Edict. Diocl.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:9:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.5</biblScope></bibl>, al.:—hence <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλῐκαρικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to boots</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φόρμαι</foreign> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
